diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 955971e..0f9dab6 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -2,34 +2,36 @@
 
 ## Critical mechanics / API lessons
-- Installed CLI uses `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; the rationale string is the weekly log. Standalone `nm.analytics.log_rationale` is absent/obsolete, so do not call it separately.
+- Installed CLI uses `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; this rationale string replaces standalone `log_rationale`. Do not call separate `nm.analytics.log_rationale`.
 - Query active subs with `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`; enterprise open threads: `enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0`. Last sender matters; if last sender is agent, wait. D_E09 #22814 is already lost/timed out though thread remains open.
-- `set_targeted_ad_spend`, `set_targeted_dev_spend`, `set_targeted_ops_spend`, promos and ads are full snapshot replacements. Clear stale keys explicitly.
+- `set_targeted_ad_spend`, `set_targeted_dev_spend`, `set_targeted_ops_spend`, promos and ads are full snapshot replacements. Actual installed `set_targeted_ops_spend` signature is ONLY `targeted_spend={group:$/day}` (no by_customer/by_plan despite docs); do not use unsupported kwargs.
 - In-app ads strength stays 0; quality/reputation > small ad revenue. `set_prices` affects new subscription rows; lead promos affect first-month acquisition price, while row `effective_price` is future renewal/list price.
 
-## State at Day 84 before Week 12 actions
-- Cash $690,725; 57,318 individual subs; 0 enterprise seats; open issues 5,208. Active recurring row MRR ~$4.50M/mo: S2 54.4k subs (mostly A, avg future A $77.4 before actions), S3 2.9k.
-- Week 78-84 economics: subscription cash $841.2k; ads $186.9k; ops $91.0k; dev $105.0k; capacity $70.0k; compute $348.1k; lead cost $12.6k => cash +$27.6k.
-- S2 content funnel remains excellent at $25k/day: 20,835 ad leads, 16,920 subs, 81.2% CVR, future avg $89.44; S2 network added 2,397 subs. S3 small funnels profitable, 80%+ CVR.
-- Usage week total 56.4M; day84 10.19M vs tier5 cap 25M, no overload/outage, peak p95 238ms. Compute is now the main cost; S2 A day84 compute at tier3 was ~$53k/day vs rev/day ~$129k, while S3 A roughly breakeven at tier3.
-- Issues mostly same-day waves (S2 4,920 age0, S3 288 age0) but social day84 had support-delay complaints (3-4 day ticket waits) and continued quota-wall complaints despite 10k/150k/500k quotas. Post 12 was positive but not enough.
-- Enterprise: no fresh inbox. E2/E3 quality floors still above delivered quality; do not buy enterprise ads yet. D_E09 old lead remains lost; ignore unless new thread appears.
+## State at Day 91 after Week 13 actions
+- Cash after immediate actions/R&D/research is only $298,210 (started from $2.291M, spent $100k market discovery before actions + $1.833M R&D + $60k D_S07 research). Do not panic if day98 cash is much higher; if it is < $0.5M, cut ads/ops/dev temporarily and delay new R&D.
+- Active subs before advancing: 89,556 individuals, $9.185M active row MRR: S2 84.9k subs ($8.68M MRR), S3 4.7k ($0.51M), no enterprise seats. Week 85-91 net cash +$1.60M before new R&D; subscription cash $2.67M, compute $255k, ads $340k, ops $210k, dev $175k, capacity $70k.
+- A2/B4/C5 worked: S2 content $45k/day got 35,485 leads -> 28,041 subs (79% CVR, future avg $139); S2 network 4,196 leads -> 3,339 subs. New cohorts had large B uptake (~1/3 S2, ~45% S3), making B very profitable despite tier4 compute. Cancellations 944 were mostly older cheap cohorts.
+- Usage week 88.2M; day91 16.2M vs tier5 cap 25M, no outage/overload, but social complained about latency and support. Open issues 8,191, mostly day0; small stale tail remains and actual ops API cannot target by customer.
+- Market discovery on day91 found D_E02 Educational Institutions (enterprise, info1) and D_S07 Data Analysts (individual, info1). D_S07 estimates: WTP ~$95 (noisy), usage ~180/day, q_floor ~0.26, cap ~54k, incoming network from S2/S3 is strong. D_S07 level2 research started, expected day94.
 
-## Week 12 actions made for Days 85-91
-- Repriced new cohorts to A/B/C = $109/$199/$399; lead promos set S2=$70 and S3=$70, keeping first-month Starter near the proven $39 while lifting renewal ARPU to $109. No ongoing discounts.
-- Moved model tiers to A2/B4/C5. Goal: cut dominant A compute by ~2/3 while preserving a high-quality upgrade path; offset A quality drop with much higher dev. Watch CVR/churn/social carefully and revert A3 if quality backlash appears.
-- Raised quotas to A=20k/day, B=250k/day, C=800k/day to address quota complaints; capacity kept tier5 (25M/day) because current peak is ~10M and A2 lowers compute but not usage.
-- Scaled acquisition: content_marketing S2 $45k/day, content_marketing S3 $2k/day, social_media S3 $1.5k/day; all other ad channels cleared. Ads strength remains 0.
-- Increased reliability/quality spend: global ops $20k/day + targeted ops S2 $8k/day and S3 $2k/day (total ops $30k/day); global dev $10k/day + targeted dev S2/S3 $7.5k/day each (total dev $25k/day). Public post 13 replied to support-delay post 174 with escalation/same-thread ownership commitments.
+## Week 13 actions made for Days 92-98
+- Pricing raised for NEW cohorts to A/B/C=$149/$239/$549, with lead promo S2/S3/D_S07=$110 and no ongoing discounts. This keeps proven first-month A/B prices at $39/$129 while lifting future ARPU (A +37%, B +20%). Watch renewal risk later (first affected renewals start around day122).
+- Model tiers kept A2/B4/C5; quotas kept A=20k, B=250k, C=800k to control compute despite quota complaints.
+- Capacity upgraded to tier6 (80M/day, $28k/day) to prevent growth-related latency/overload.
+- Spend now: global ops $35k/day + targeted ops S2 $20k, S3 $7k, D_S07 $1k (total ops $63k/day); global dev $20k + targeted dev S2 $10k, S3 $10k, D_S07 $5k (total dev $45k/day).
+- Ads snapshot now $75k/day: content S2 $60k, S3 $4k, D_S07 $3k; social S3 $3k, D_S07 $1k; search D_S07 $3k; linkedin D_S07 $1k. Ads strength 0.
+- R&D started: tier5 t5_1 cost $833k, completes day121 with LOW sampled boost +0.084; tier6 t6_1 cost $1.0M, completes day140 with HIGH sampled boost +0.556. Plan to start smaller tiers 2/3/4 once cash cushion recovers.
+- Public post 14 replied to post 187: capacity + latency work + expanded support + same-day owner updates + quota/onboarding docs.
 
-## Strategy / watch on Day 91
-- Primary hypothesis: A2 + heavy S2/S3 dev preserves acceptable perceived quality, while cutting compute enough to fund faster growth and support. If S2 content CVR <55%, cancellations spike, or social complains about quality regression, restore A3 immediately and/or reduce A price/promo.
-- Watch cash: fixed daily spend now ~$113.5k before compute/lead costs. If day91 cash <400k, cut S2 content spend to <=25k/day and defer R&D; if >1M with good CVR, consider starting tier2 R&D ($333k) and possibly tier3 after another week.
-- Watch usage vs tier5: if peak >20M/day or latency/errors worsen, prepare tier6; if usage stays <15M with A2 and cash tight, keep tier5.
-- Watch issues: any meaningful S2/S3 issue age >1 day after higher ops means raise targeted ops before further ads. Monitor response to post 13.
-- Watch S2 market cap saturation (info estimate ~167k). If S2 active approaches 150k, taper S2 ads and shift exploration/R&D/S3; hidden-market research can wait until cash cushion is safer.
+## Strategy / watch on Day 98
+- Primary hypothesis: price+promo move preserves acquisition CVR because first-month A/B prices unchanged, while future ARPU rises; tier6 + higher ops protects reputation; D_S07 becomes the next growth segment as S2 approaches cap.
+- Watch cash first. If day98 cash < $0.5M, immediately reduce S2 content to <=$35k/day, D_S07 tests to <=$3k/day, and delay R&D. If cash >$1.5M with good CVR, start tier2+tier3 R&D; if >$3M also tier4.
+- Watch S2 cap: active S2 84.9k vs noisy cap ~167k. If S2 >140k or ad leads/$ fall hard, taper S2 spend and shift to D_S07/S3/market discovery.
+- Watch D_S07 ad performance by channel and network conversion; if CVR strong and first-month CAC profitable, scale best D_S07 channels. If D_S07 churn/complaints emerge, add targeted dev/consider lower future effective price later.
+- Watch support/social: issue ages >1 day, stale S2/S3 issues, and latency complaints. Ops is now expensive; if still social-negative, keep/high ops; if resolved, can trim after day105.
+- Enterprise: no fresh inbox at day91. D_E02 and D_E09 may get network leads, but do not buy enterprise ads until quality/R&D improves and negotiations appear.
 
-## Forecasts submitted from Day 84
-- Day91: point ~$1.0M, 95% CI $0.35M-$1.8M.
-- Day112: point ~$2.7M, 95% CI $0.9M-$7.0M.
-- Day168: point ~$20M, 95% CI $6M-$55M.
-- Day266: point ~$65M, 95% CI $10M-$160M.
+## Forecasts planned from Day 91 after actions
+- Day98: point ~$1.8M, 95% CI -$0.2M to $3.5M.
+- Day119: point ~$4.5M, 95% CI $0.5M to $10M (assumes some tier2/3/4 R&D if cash recovers).
+- Day175: point ~$38M, 95% CI $8M to $85M.
+- Day273: point ~$135M, 95% CI $30M to $300M.

import novamind_api as nm, json

def show(name, res):
    print('\n---', name, '---')
    print(json.dumps(res, indent=2, default=str)[:6000])

# Cash before major actions (market research already performed separately this week)
show('cash_before_actions', nm.query('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) AS cash FROM ledger')['rows'])

# 1) Pricing: preserve proven first-month A/B prices via larger lead promo, lift future ARPU for new cohorts.
show('set_prices', nm.pricing.set_prices(A=149, B=239, C=549))
show('set_model_tiers', nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=4, C=5))
show('set_usage_quotas', nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=20000, B=250000, C=800000))
show('set_promotion', nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}, by_group_plan={}))
# Include every known group explicitly to avoid stale keys; S2/S3/D_S07 get $110 first-month discount.
show('set_lead_promotion', nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(
    global_promotion=0.0,
    by_group={'S1':0.0,'S2':110.0,'S3':110.0,'E1':0.0,'E2':0.0,'E3':0.0,'D_E09':0.0,'D_E02':0.0,'D_S07':110.0},
    by_channel={},
    by_channel_group={}
))
show('set_ads_strength', nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}))

# 2) Infrastructure and spend: prepare for growth, support complaints, and D_S07 launch.
show('set_capacity_tier', nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
show('set_daily_spend', nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=35000, development=20000))

# Prioritize stale support issues by customer for one week, plus group-level pools.
old_rows = nm.query("SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM issues WHERE status='open' AND days_open>=2 ORDER BY customer_id LIMIT 200")['rows']
by_customer = {str(r['customer_id']): 75.0 for r in old_rows}
show('old_issue_customers_targeted', {'n': len(by_customer), 'by_customer': list(by_customer.items())[:20]})
show('set_targeted_ops_spend', nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(
    by_group={'S2':15000.0,'S3':5000.0,'D_S07':1000.0},
    by_plan={},
    by_group_plan={},
    by_customer=by_customer
))
show('set_targeted_dev_spend', nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={'S2':10000.0,'S3':10000.0,'D_S07':5000.0}))

# 3) Acquisition: scale proven S2/S3 channels, and run measured D_S07 channel tests.
show('set_targeted_ad_spend', nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
    'content_marketing': {'S2':60000.0, 'S3':4000.0, 'D_S07':3000.0},
    'social_media': {'S3':3000.0, 'D_S07':1000.0},
    'search_ads': {'D_S07':3000.0},
    'linkedin': {'D_S07':1000.0},
    'referral_program': {}
}))

# 4) R&D and group research: permanent quality runway and better D_S07 data.
for tier in [5, 6]:
    try:
        show(f'start_research_tier_{tier}', nm.research.start_research_project(tier=tier))
    except Exception as e:
        show(f'start_research_tier_{tier}_ERR', {'error': str(e)})
try:
    show('research_group_D_S07_L2', nm.market.research_group(group_id='D_S07', target_level=2))
except Exception as e:
    show('research_group_D_S07_L2_ERR', {'error': str(e)})

# 5) Public response to support/latency complaints.
post = "You're right. We’re adding capacity now, funding latency work, and expanding support so critical workflow tickets get a named owner + same-day updates. Quota/onboarding docs are being rewritten so batch jobs fail less silently."
show('post_social_media', nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=post, reply_to_post_id=187))

show('cash_after_actions', nm.query('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) AS cash FROM ledger')['rows'])
show('research_projects', nm.query('SELECT * FROM research_projects ORDER BY started_day DESC, tier')['rows'])
show('config_overrides_latest', nm.query('SELECT * FROM config_overrides ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10')['rows'])

import novamind_api as nm, math, json
cur=nm.vars.current_day
cash=float(nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) cash FROM ledger')['rows'][0]['cash'])
rows=nm.query("SELECT billing_day_mod30 mod, COUNT(*) n, SUM(effective_price*seat_count) amt FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' GROUP BY billing_day_mod30")['rows']
cohorts=[{'mod':int(r['mod']),'count':float(r['n']),'amt':float(r['amt'] or 0)} for r in rows]
cnts={r['group_id']:float(r['n']) for r in nm.query("SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) n FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id WHERE s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY c.group_id")['rows']}
print('start',cur,cash,cnts,'mrr',sum(c['amt'] for c in cohorts))

# Approx current post-action fixed settings
current_fixed={'ads':75000.0,'ops':35000.0+28000.0,'dev':20000.0+25000.0,'capacity':28000.0}

# existing research completions do not directly affect cash in the model except via optimistic churn/CVR baked into scenarios.

def simulate(params):
    cash0=cash
    cohorts0=[c.copy() for c in cohorts]
    S2=cnts.get('S2',0.0); S3=cnts.get('S3',0.0); S1=cnts.get('S1',0.0); DS7=cnts.get('D_S07',0.0)
    out=[]
    daily=[]
    for d in range(cur+1,cur+183):
        t=d-cur
        # Ad policy: scale proven channels until S2 nears cap; D_S07 exploratory then scaled if point/high.
        if S2 < params['s2_taper1'] and t <= params['s2_full_days']:
            s2_spend=60000.0
        elif S2 < params['s2_taper2']:
            s2_spend=30000.0
        else:
            s2_spend=10000.0
        s3_spend=7000.0 if S3 < params['capS3']*0.75 and t <= 84 else 3000.0
        ds7_spend=(8000.0 if t <= params['ds7_test_days'] else params['ds7_scaled_spend']) if DS7 < params['capDS7']*0.80 else 3000.0
        ad_spend=s2_spend+s3_spend+ds7_spend
        # ops/dev will likely stay elevated while support/social is fragile, then normalize modestly
        if t <= 42:
            ops=63000.0; dev=45000.0
        elif t <= 98:
            ops=50000.0; dev=40000.0
        else:
            ops=40000.0; dev=30000.0
        # capacity tier 6 until usage demands tier 7
        capS2=params['capS2']; capS3=params['capS3']; capDS7=params['capDS7']
        capfac2=max(0.03,1-S2/capS2)**params['cap_power']
        capfac3=max(0.05,1-S3/capS3)**params['cap_power']
        capfac7=max(0.05,1-DS7/capDS7)**params['cap_power']
        # Calibrated from days 85-91: 45k S2 content -> 5.07k leads/day at avg ~68k active.
        s2_ad=(5069.0*((s2_spend/45000.0)**params['ad_elastic'])*((capfac2/(max(0.03,1-68000/170000)**params['cap_power']))))*params['rep_mult']
        s3_ad=(230.0*((s3_spend/3500.0)**params['ad_elastic'])*capfac3/(max(0.05,1-3600/65000)**params['cap_power']))*params['rep_mult']
        # D_S07 ad effectiveness uncertain; params in leads/day per $8k at low saturation
        ds7_ad=params['ds7_ad_base']*((ds7_spend/8000.0)**params['ad_elastic'])*capfac7*params['rep_mult']
        # Network effects; calibrated with observed source=network and insights for D_S07.
        s2_net=(0.0075*S2 + 0.0010*S3 + 0.0010*DS7)*capfac2*params['net_mult']
        s3_net=(0.0009*S2 + 0.0015*S3 + 0.0025*DS7)*capfac3*params['net_mult']
        ds7_net=(0.0027*S2 + 0.0039*S3 + 0.0010*DS7)*capfac7*params['net_mult']
        s2_leads=max(0,s2_ad+s2_net); s3_leads=max(0,s3_ad+s3_net); ds7_leads=max(0,ds7_ad+ds7_net)
        s2_sub=s2_leads*params['s2_cvr']; s3_sub=s3_leads*params['s3_cvr']; ds7_sub=ds7_leads*params['ds7_cvr']
        # First payments are unchanged for A/B by the price+lead-promo move; future MRR rises for new rows.
        first=s2_sub*params['s2_first'] + s3_sub*params['s3_first'] + ds7_sub*params['ds7_first']
        new_mrr=s2_sub*params['s2_mrr'] + s3_sub*params['s3_mrr'] + ds7_sub*params['ds7_mrr']
        new_count=s2_sub+s3_sub+ds7_sub
        # renewals from existing and prior new cohorts
        renew=0.0
        churn=params['monthly_churn']
        for c in cohorts0:
            if d%30==c['mod']:
                renew += c['amt']*(1-params['bill_loss'])
                c['count'] *= (1-churn)
                c['amt'] *= (1-churn)
        cohorts0.append({'mod':d%30,'count':new_count,'amt':new_mrr})
        # Approx group attrition continuous; actual billing churn lumpy
        S2=S2*(1-params['daily_decay'])+s2_sub
        S3=S3*(1-params['daily_decay'])+s3_sub
        DS7=DS7*(1-params['daily_decay_ds7'])+ds7_sub
        S1=S1*(1-params['daily_decay'])
        usage=(S2*190 + S3*450 + DS7*210)*params['usage_mult']
        capcost=28000.0 if usage <= 80_000_000 else 75000.0
        compute=(S2*0.48 + S3*1.35 + DS7*0.70)*params['usage_mult']
        lead_cost=0.5*(s2_leads+s3_leads+ds7_leads)
        rd=params.get('rd_days',{}).get(d,0.0)
        market=params.get('market_days',{}).get(d,0.0)
        costs=ad_spend+ops+dev+capcost+compute+lead_cost+rd+market
        cash0 += first+renew-costs
        if t in [7,28,84,182]:
            out.append({'t':t,'day':d,'cash':cash0,'active':S2+S3+DS7+S1,'S2':S2,'S3':S3,'D_S07':DS7,'mrr':sum(c['amt'] for c in cohorts0),'first':first,'renew':renew,'costs':costs,'rd':rd,'ads':ad_spend,'compute':compute,'new':new_count})
    return out

base_rd={98:833333,105:666667,112:1166667,119:1333333,126:1500000,133:1666667,147:2500000,161:3666667}
point=dict(capS2=175000.0,capS3=65000.0,capDS7=54000.0,cap_power=0.70,ad_elastic=0.85,rep_mult=1.0,net_mult=1.0,s2_full_days=28,s2_taper1=150000,s2_taper2=170000,ds7_test_days=14,ds7_scaled_spend=16000.0,ds7_ad_base=360.0,s2_cvr=0.78,s3_cvr=0.86,ds7_cvr=0.62,s2_first=69.3,s3_first=80.0,ds7_first=57.0,s2_mrr=179.3,s3_mrr=190.0,ds7_mrr=167.0,monthly_churn=0.055,bill_loss=0.025,daily_decay=0.055/30,daily_decay_ds7=0.075/30,usage_mult=1.15,rd_days=base_rd,market_days={98:100000,112:100000,126:100000,140:100000})
low=dict(point); low.update(capS2=145000,capS3=50000,capDS7=35000,cap_power=1.20,ad_elastic=0.65,rep_mult=0.70,net_mult=0.65,s2_full_days=14,s2_taper1=120000,s2_taper2=140000,ds7_scaled_spend=6000,ds7_ad_base=120,s2_cvr=0.58,s3_cvr=0.65,ds7_cvr=0.30,s2_first=62,s3_first=68,ds7_first=42,s2_mrr=150,s3_mrr=155,ds7_mrr=105,monthly_churn=0.13,bill_loss=0.10,daily_decay=0.13/30,daily_decay_ds7=0.18/30,usage_mult=1.55,rd_days={98:333333,112:500000},market_days={})
high=dict(point); high.update(capS2=210000,capS3=80000,capDS7=80000,cap_power=0.45,ad_elastic=0.98,rep_mult=1.20,net_mult=1.25,s2_full_days=42,s2_taper1=175000,s2_taper2=200000,ds7_scaled_spend=25000,ds7_ad_base=700,s2_cvr=0.86,s3_cvr=0.91,ds7_cvr=0.76,s2_first=72,s3_first=86,ds7_first=65,s2_mrr=184,s3_mrr=200,ds7_mrr=180,monthly_churn=0.025,bill_loss=0.0,daily_decay=0.025/30,daily_decay_ds7=0.035/30,usage_mult=1.0,rd_days={98:833333,105:666667,112:1166667,119:1333333,126:1500000,133:1666667,140:2500000,147:3666667,161:5000000,175:6666667,210:9166667},market_days={98:200000,105:200000,112:200000,126:200000,140:200000})
for name,params in [('LOW',low),('POINT',point),('HIGH',high)]:
    print('\nSCENARIO',name)
    for r in simulate(params):
        print(json.dumps(r, sort_keys=True))

import novamind_api as nm, json, math

def q(sql):
    try:
        return nm.query(sql)['rows']
    except Exception as e:
        return [{'ERROR': str(e), 'SQL': sql}]

def pr(title, obj, maxchars=20000):
    print('\n===', title, '===')
    s=json.dumps(obj, indent=2, default=str)
    print(s[:maxchars])
    if len(s)>maxchars: print('...TRUNCATED', len(s))

cur=getattr(nm.vars,'current_day',None)
print('current_day',cur)
pr('cash ledger sum', q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) AS cash FROM ledger'))
# last weeks
for start,end in [(85,91),(78,84),(71,77)]:
    pr(f'ledger by category days {start}-{end}', q(f"SELECT category, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amount FROM ledger WHERE day BETWEEN {start} AND {end} GROUP BY category ORDER BY amount DESC"), 12000)
    pr(f'daily net cash {start}-{end}', q(f"SELECT day, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) net FROM ledger WHERE day BETWEEN {start} AND {end} GROUP BY day ORDER BY day"), 8000)
pr('ledger by day/category days 85-91', q("SELECT day, category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amount FROM ledger WHERE day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 GROUP BY day, category ORDER BY day, category"), 30000)
pr('subscriptions active aggregate by group/plan', q("SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id WHERE s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan"), 12000)
pr('active by exact price', q("SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(s.effective_price,2) price, COUNT(*) subs, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id WHERE s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan, ROUND(s.effective_price,2) ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan, price LIMIT 200"), 25000)
pr('active cohorts last 60d', q("SELECT s.start_day, c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) subs, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND s.start_day>=32 GROUP BY s.start_day,c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY s.start_day DESC,c.group_id,s.plan"), 50000)
pr('lead conversion days 85-91 by group/source/plan', q("SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, COALESCE(s.plan,'none') plan, COUNT(*) leads, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) subscribed, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) cvr, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN s.effective_price ELSE NULL END),2) avg_eff FROM customers c LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 GROUP BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,COALESCE(s.plan,'none') ORDER BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,plan"), 30000)
pr('lead conversion days 85-91 by group/source', q("SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, COUNT(*) leads, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) subscribed, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) cvr, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN s.effective_price ELSE NULL END),2) avg_eff FROM customers c LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 GROUP BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source ORDER BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source"), 20000)
pr('created by day/group/source/status', q("SELECT c.created_day, c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.status, COUNT(*) n FROM customers c LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 GROUP BY c.created_day,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.status ORDER BY c.created_day,c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.status"), 50000)
pr('ad performance agg days 85-91', q("SELECT a.channel_id, a.group_id, ROUND(SUM(a.spend),2) spend, SUM(a.leads_generated) ad_leads, ROUND(SUM(a.leads_generated)*1000.0/SUM(a.spend),2) leads_per_1k, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers c WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 AND c.group_id=a.group_id AND c.acquisition_source=a.channel_id) created, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 AND c.group_id=a.group_id AND c.acquisition_source=a.channel_id AND s.status='subscribed') subs, ROUND((SELECT AVG(s.effective_price) FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE c.created_day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 AND c.group_id=a.group_id AND c.acquisition_source=a.channel_id AND s.status='subscribed'),2) avg_eff FROM ad_channel_leads a WHERE a.day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 GROUP BY a.channel_id,a.group_id ORDER BY spend DESC"), 12000)
pr('ad leads by day 85-91', q("SELECT day, channel_id, group_id, ROUND(spend,2) spend, leads_generated, ROUND(CASE WHEN spend>0 THEN leads_generated*1000.0/spend ELSE NULL END,2) leads_per_1k FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 ORDER BY day,channel_id,group_id"), 30000)
pr('service days 85-91', q("SELECT * FROM service_day WHERE day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 ORDER BY day"), 15000)
pr('usage by group days 85-91', q("SELECT u.day, c.group_id, COUNT(DISTINCT u.customer_id) users, ROUND(SUM(u.usage_units),0) usage FROM daily_usage u JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=u.customer_id WHERE u.day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 GROUP BY u.day,c.group_id ORDER BY u.day,c.group_id"), 30000)
pr('usage by group/plan days 85-91 total', q("SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(DISTINCT u.customer_id) users, ROUND(SUM(u.usage_units),0) usage, ROUND(AVG(u.usage_units),1) avg_daily_usage_per_record FROM daily_usage u JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=u.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=u.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed' WHERE u.day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id,s.plan"), 12000)
pr('issues open by group age', q("SELECT group_id, days_open, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE status='open' GROUP BY group_id, days_open ORDER BY group_id, days_open"), 30000)
pr('issues opened days 85-91', q("SELECT group_id, open_day, COUNT(*) opened, SUM(CASE WHEN status='resolved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) already_resolved FROM issues WHERE open_day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 GROUP BY group_id,open_day ORDER BY open_day,group_id"), 30000)
pr('issues resolved days 85-91', q("SELECT group_id, resolved_day, COUNT(*) resolved FROM issues WHERE resolved_day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 GROUP BY group_id,resolved_day ORDER BY resolved_day,group_id"), 30000)
pr('cancellations days 85-91', q("SELECT s.end_day, c.group_id, s.plan, s.start_day, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND s.end_day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 GROUP BY s.end_day,c.group_id,s.plan,s.start_day ORDER BY s.end_day,c.group_id,s.plan,s.start_day"), 50000)
pr('upgrades/downgrades-ish active pending changes?', q("SELECT pending_plan, COUNT(*) n FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' GROUP BY pending_plan"), 10000)
# upcoming billing next 60 days
pr('upcoming billings active next 60 by day', q("WITH RECURSIVE days(d) AS (SELECT 92 UNION ALL SELECT d+1 FROM days WHERE d<151) SELECT days.d AS due_day, COUNT(*) subs, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) cash_due FROM days JOIN subscriptions s ON s.status='subscribed' AND (days.d % 30)=s.billing_day_mod30 GROUP BY days.d ORDER BY days.d"), 20000)
pr('upcoming billings next 45 by day/group/plan', q("WITH RECURSIVE days(d) AS (SELECT 92 UNION ALL SELECT d+1 FROM days WHERE d<136) SELECT days.d AS due_day, c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) subs, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) cash_due FROM days JOIN subscriptions s ON s.status='subscribed' AND (days.d % 30)=s.billing_day_mod30 JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id GROUP BY days.d,c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY days.d,c.group_id,s.plan"), 50000)
pr('open enterprise all', q("SELECT * FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 ORDER BY customer_id, day, turn_number"), 20000)
pr('enterprise last by open thread', q("WITH m AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) SELECT t.* FROM enterprise_turns t JOIN m ON m.mid=t.message_id ORDER BY t.day,t.customer_id"), 12000)
pr('notifications 85-91', q("SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 ORDER BY notification_id"), 12000)
pr('agent posts', q("SELECT * FROM agent_social_media_posts ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 10"), 10000)
pr('recent social posts 85-91', q("SELECT * FROM social_media_posts WHERE day BETWEEN 85 AND 91 ORDER BY day DESC, post_id DESC LIMIT 120"), 50000)
pr('config history last 10', q("SELECT * FROM config_history ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 10"), 12000)
pr('config overrides recent', q("SELECT * FROM config_overrides ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 40"), 30000)
pr('research projects table', q("SELECT * FROM research_projects ORDER BY started_day DESC,tier"), 15000)
